content:
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
                            "Girl on TV" - LFO
----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Tabbed by: americanclassic

Tuning: Standard


[Intro]

[ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]                      [ch]Em[/ch]
Wish for you on a falling star[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Wondering where you are[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]

[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Met her at a county fair[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]
She wore a green dress, and everybody was there[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]                                         [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
I felt out of place 'till she looked into my eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Shook her hand around 9 P.M.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]
And I'm never gonna be the same again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]

The only problem is she's a movie star, ooh[/tab]

If they could only see me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
At the risk of sounding cheesy[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
